leagueBriefing: Ligue 1 saw a major shake-up at the top as title challengers Lens stumbled, while Monaco and Nice solidified their European ambitions. Lens missed a golden opportunity to leapfrog idle Paris Saint-Germain, falling to a resilient Lorient side. Meanwhile, Monaco extended their winning streak to five matches behind a record-breaking performance from Folarin Balogun, and Nice found some much-needed form on the road at Angers.

games.headline: Tosin late show denies Lens top spot in Lorient stunner
games.brief: Lens arrived at the Stade du Moustoir knowing a win would take them top of Ligue 1, but they left empty-handed after a spirited Lorient performance. Bamba Dieng’s early opener set the tone, and while Odsonne Édouard pulled Lens level shortly after halftime, substitute Aiyegun Tosin proved to be the hero, pouncing in the 65th minute to hand the title hopefuls a damaging defeat.
bullets: Aiyegun Tosin scored the winning goal just minutes after coming off the bench, capitalising on a defensive lapse.
Bamba Dieng opened the scoring in the 18th minute, punishing Lens for failing to clear a corner.
Odsonne Édouard reached double figures for the season with his 10th league goal to temporarily level the match.
Lorient goalkeeper Yvon Mvogo made five crucial saves to keep Lens' high-powered attack at bay.
games.context: Lens remains in second place, trailing PSG by a single point, while Lorient climbs to eighth and into the European conversation.

highlights.title: Lorient vs Lens | HIGHLIGHTS Ligue 1 | 03/14/2026 | beIN SPORTS USA

games.headline: Bard and Wahi strike late to earn Nice rare away victory
games.brief: Nice put aside their recent travel woes to secure a professional 2-0 win over Angers at the Stade Raymond Kopa. After a cagey first hour, Melvin Bard broke the deadlock with a clinical finish before Elye Wahi, returning from injury, marked his second-half cameo with a sensational chip in stoppage time to secure only Nice's second league win since October.
bullets: Melvin Bard's 65th-minute strike was his first goal of the campaign.
Elye Wahi came off the bench to provide an assist for the opener before scoring a brilliant chip in the 96th minute.
Angers failed to register a single shot on target throughout the match despite holding significant possession.
Hervé Koffi was the standout for the hosts, making six saves to keep Angers in the match until the final moments.
games.context: The win provides breathing room for a struggling Nice side, while Angers continues to slide toward the relegation playoff spot.

highlights.title: Angers vs Nice  | HIGHLIGHTS Ligue 1 | 03/14/2026 | beIN SPORTS USA

games.headline: Balogun stays hot as Monaco cruise to fifth straight win
games.brief: Monaco’s surge up the table continued at the Stade Louis II as they comfortably dispatched fellow European hopefuls Brest 2-0. Folarin Balogun continued his remarkable individual form by scoring for the fourth consecutive match, and Aleksandr Golovin marked his 200th Ligue 1 appearance with a trademark finish to seal a fifth consecutive victory for the Principality club.
bullets: Folarin Balogun scored his 14th goal of the season in the 19th minute, maintaining his lead in the club's scoring charts.
Aleksandr Golovin doubled the advantage in the 78th minute on his milestone 200th league game.
Monaco is now unbeaten in their last eight league matches, the longest active streak in Ligue 1.
Brest dominated the aerial battles (26 offensive aerials won) but struggled to test Monaco's returning keeper Lukáš Hrádecký.
games.context: Monaco climbs to fifth place, moving within three points of the Champions League qualification spots.
